tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Use of There.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of There का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: There is a book on the table. There is a fan in my room. There is a problem in the system. There is a meeting at 3 pm. There is a new student in our class.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) about your day using Use of There.
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपने दिन के बारे में Use of There का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: There is a temple near my house. There is some water in the glass. There is a lot of work today. There is a dog outside the door. There is a bus stop near here.

tasks.prompt: Translate the following into English: "थिएटर में एक नई फिल्म है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: There is a new movie in the theatre.

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "There are a meeting at 3 pm."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: There is a meeting at 3 pm.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue between two people using Use of There.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Use of There का उपयोग करते हुए दो व्यक्तियों के बीच 4 पंक्तियों का संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: There is a chair near the window. There is a hospital on MG Road. There is a new teacher today. There is milk in the fridge.
